Quality Engineer

We are looking for a Quality Engineer supports the development, implementation, and maintenance of quality systems that ensure products meet customer expectations, regulatory requirements, and internal standards. This role is ideal for someone early in their engineering career who is eager to learn, solve problems, and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives across the organization.

Our ideal candidate:

- 2+ years of experience as a Quality Engineer

- AS9100/AS9102

The Quality Engineer will evaluate and/or appraise supplier's manufacturing capabilities to baseline their processes for conformance to various documented commodity checklists, and/or QMS special processes. Establishes part quality evaluation plans from materials requests through material receipt (full life-cycle). Provides resolution and disposition of non-conformance materials to ensure adequate corrective action.
• The Quality Engineer is highly supplier-focused, requiring excellent interpers

Responsibilities include monitoring production, conducting inspections, leading quality improvement projects, and documenting quality standards.

The role requires effective communication and the ability to apply engineering principles in operations and maintenance tasks
